title: Algeria at the 2026 World Cup: roster, list, players, group and schedule
original_text: With established names such as Riyad Mahrez, rising stars like Rayan Aït-Nouri and familiar figures including Luca Zidane, Algeria arrives at the 2026 FIFA World Cup carrying high expectations. It will be the nation’s fifth appearance at the tournament, and Vladimir Petkovic’s squad has the talent and experience to dream of reaching the knockout rounds. A mix of proven veterans and players competing at some of Europe’s top clubs gives Algeria one of its strongest squads in years. While the challenge will be significant, the Desert Foxes have reason to believe they can compete with anyone on their day. Goalkeepers: Defenders: Midfielders: Forwards: Head coach: Vladimir Petkovic It will not be easy, but Algeria has enough quality throughout the roster to believe it can advance from the group stage. Argentina awaits in the opening game, before two crucial contests against opponents viewed as more manageable on paper. Group J Get closer to the game!
